Partnership Benefits

Choose the tier that fits your brand.

Title Sponsor

Exclusive · 1 seat

Custom
  • Naming rights - "[Your Brand] BdMSO 2026"
  • Bangladesh Delegation seat in Jakarta (1 rep)
  • Full demographic & insights data sharing
  • Top logo on jerseys, certificates, medals & all media
  • Speaking slots at all major events
  • Content rights - feature medalists in your campaigns
Powered By

Exclusive · 1 seat

Custom
  • Naming rights - "BdMSO 2026 Powered by [Your Brand]"
  • Performance data & participant demographics access
  • Second-largest logo on collaterals, backdrops & T-shirts
  • Speaking slots at the National Olympiad, camps & press briefings
  • Premium stall placement at the National Olympiad
Custom Partner

Open tier

Custom
  • Custom logo on website
  • Acknowledgement at key events
  • Social media features
  • Annual impact report

Let's build something together.

Share a few details about your organization and we'll get back within two working days with a tailored deck and a call invite.
